entries.collision_notes: Walls and major props use logical collision, floor art has no collision.
entries.interaction_notes: Base layer only, props use separate entries.
entries.visual_notes: Entry, living room, kitchen, bathroom, and stairs, dark walls and blue-grey floors.
entries.scale_notes: Match shared apartment scale and Art Bible anchor rules.
entries.implementation_notes: Keep walls, doors, props, and lighting separable for runtime.
